Language: kotlin
Extension For Cloud Stream To Stream Netflix , Disney+ Hotstar, Prime Video [Netmirror,Tamilian] Even other otts such as SonyLiv aha etc [MovieBox] and To Watch Indian Live Tv Channels

Language: kotlin
Agent framework for the JVM. Pronounced Em-BAY-bel /ɛmˈbeɪbəl/

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google-ai-edge/gallery
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google-ai-edge/gallery
Language: kotlin
A gallery that showcases on-device ML/GenAI use cases and allows people to try and use models locally.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: iamgio/quarkdown
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iamgio/quarkdown
Language: kotlin
🪐 Markdown with superpowers: from ideas to papers, presentations, websites, books, and knowledge bases.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: koiverse/ArchiveTune
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/koiverse/ArchiveTune
Language: kotlin
The Cutest Material 3 Expressive Music Player With Support Local File and Youtube Music for Android.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pppscn/SmsForwarder
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pppscn/SmsForwarder
Language: kotlin
短信转发器——监控Android手机短信、来电、APP通知，并根据指定规则转发到其他手机：钉钉群自定义机器人、钉钉企业内机器人、企业微信群机器人、飞书机器人、企业微信应用消息、邮箱、bark、webhook、Telegram机器人、Server酱、PushPlus、手机短信等。包括主动控制服务端与客户端，让你轻松远程发短信、查短信、查通话、查话簿、查电量等。（V3.0 新增）PS.这个APK主要是学习与自用，如有BUG请提ISSUE，同时欢迎大家提PR指正

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sameerasw/essentials
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sameerasw/essentials
Language: kotlin
Essential tools and mods for Android nerds

ns0:entry.ns0:title: square/okhttp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/square/okhttp
Language: kotlin
Square’s meticulous HTTP client for the JVM, Android, and GraalVM.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: thunderbird/thunderbird-android

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zly2006/zhihu-plus-plus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zly2006/zhihu-plus-plus
Language: kotlin
